sections.description: The carousel introduces itself like a memory with gears still turning.
The same turn begins to glow, but the machinery stays audible.
The ride continues as ash, silhouette, and afterimage.
The carousel comes back into view with more tenderness than before.
One last turn seals the loop with a quiet ember instead of a blaze.

insights.message: The carousel answer returns in the mirror and the late return.
95 symbolic timing placements were normalized into absolute beat events.

rhythm.summary: 100% of note events carry rhythm roles, 100% anchor downbeat presence, 0 offbeat-only bars, cadence contract satisfied
insights: Rhythmic bar roles cover 24 of 24 bars.
Anchor voice articulates the downbeat in 100% of its active bars.
Every active bar retains at least one strong-beat articulation.
Cadence contract satisfied at bar 24, beat 1.
